//: Worklist + rewrite map for campaign images. The image binaries are gitignored and never published. For each entry, reverse-image-search the local file at content/<key> to find a STABLE external image URL, then set 'url'. url=null => the embed is omitted on the published site with an '(image pending)' placeholder. 'usedIn' lists the notes that embed it. No URL is validated or filtered — that's on you.

map-01.01-saltmarsh.png.note: CANDIDATE (from /flesh-out): GoS Map 1.1 Village of Saltmarsh, official PLAYER version (no DM annotations). Vet hotlink stability before relying on it.
